data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic hold expiry and seat release, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes the expected behavior, but there are no prior steps that demonstrate the actual implementation or validation of this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of automatic hold expiry and seat release.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the automatic hold expiry and seat release requirement.
